name: author arc link repairs legacy active thread ids

source.purpose: Regression for live Ch1 502 where Chapter Author put chapter-active thread ids in legacy arc_link.arc_thread_ids. The contract should deterministically repair them into chapter-to-arc thread_links instead of forcing another setup call.

arcPlan.title: The Tithe

scenarioShape.premise: A hidden route turns official shortage pressure into human leverage.

arcPlan.arcQuestion: Can the Warden preserve authority without exposing the people the route protects?

thread_writ_leverage.title: Writ leverage
thread_writ_leverage.retrievalCue: The Warden's authority can shield or expose locals.
thread_writ_leverage.resolutionCriteria: The Warden's authority is spent, refused, or redefined.

thread_network_exposure.title: Network exposure
thread_network_exposure.retrievalCue: The hidden route can save people or become evidence.
thread_network_exposure.resolutionCriteria: The route is protected, exposed, or redirected.
thread_network_exposure.failureMode: The route becomes proof of organized defiance.

thread_house_complicity.title: House complicity
thread_house_complicity.retrievalCue: Patron power profits from who gets counted.
thread_house_complicity.resolutionCriteria: The House's role is proven, bargained with, or buried.
thread_house_complicity.failureMode: The House writes the official version.

chapter_frame.title: The Tithe Ledger
chapter_frame.premise: A frontier settlement's missing Resonants become a procedural legitimacy crisis.
chapter_frame.active_pressure: The Synod clock is already counting down.
chapter_frame.chapter_scope: One settlement, one public dispute, one hidden extraction channel.
chapter_frame.objective: Resolve the missing tithe roster before the Synod escalates.
chapter_frame.crucible: The Warden must choose what kind of authority binds the room.

outcome_spectrum.clean: Kessrin still calls you back; Laine promise still feels reachable.
outcome_spectrum.costly: Renn now treats you as an asset; Patel debt is owed.
outcome_spectrum.failure: Vasek now has your transponder ID; Sable contact is burned.
outcome_spectrum.catastrophic: Solitaire knows your face; the corridor hunts your registry forever.

antagonist_field.core_pressure: Quarterly Resonant compliance cannot be delayed without visible cost.
antagonist_field.escalation_logic: Every delay converts local negotiation into formal breach language.

starting_npcs.name: Vesh Tal
starting_npcs.affiliation: Imperial Service (sworn to the PC's authority)
starting_npcs.voice_note: Keeps sentences clipped when the room turns public.
starting_npcs.hidden_pressure: Knows which filing delay would shield the Warden temporarily.
starting_npcs.retrieval_cue: Vesh measures the room by which official seal is visible.
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: years of sworn service bind Vesh directly to the Warden

starting_npcs.name: Auditor Corvin Hale
starting_npcs.hidden_pressure: Needs this audit to erase a prior softness mark.
starting_npcs.retrieval_cue: Corvin turns every pause into a citation.
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: cross institutional rivalry makes Corvin treat mercy as weakness

starting_npcs.name: Ash Renn
starting_npcs.hidden_pressure: Has already moved one Resonant beyond the settlement perimeter.
starting_npcs.retrieval_cue: Ash never names the route while a seal is visible.
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: Undrift doctrine treats Imperial Wardens as extraction hazards

active_threads.title: Shortfall truth
active_threads.question: Can the Warden use authority to expose the real shortfall without breaking trust?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: A filed roster or a formal extension with named cost.
active_threads.failure_mode: The Synod treats the settlement as noncompliant.
active_threads.retrieval_cue: Warden authority, shortfall truth, local trust.

active_threads.title: Warden stance
active_threads.question: Will the Warden protect settlement standing or Patron House comfort?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The crowd accepts a concrete next step.
active_threads.failure_mode: The council steps become the real court.
active_threads.retrieval_cue: Patron House complicity, settlement standing, Warden stance.

active_threads.title: The Undrift route
active_threads.question: Does the hidden route stay concealed?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The Warden discovers or deliberately leaves the route unexposed.
active_threads.retrieval_cue: Missing rooms, dawn carts, withheld names.

pressure_ladder.pressure: Corvin uses the filing deadline to expose Vesh's prior delay.
pressure_ladder.trigger_condition: The Warden asks for more time.
pressure_ladder.narrative_effect: Vesh's protection of the PC becomes leverage.

pressure_ladder.pressure: The station package becomes leverage before Ash can move it.
pressure_ladder.trigger_condition: The PC retrieves the package from the station.
pressure_ladder.narrative_effect: Ash loses freedom to move the package quietly.
Vesh risks reputation if she blocks Synod wording.

possible_revelations.statement: Corvin protected last quarter's tithe delay to keep leverage over Vesh.
possible_revelations.emergence_condition: Corvin is pressed on why he arrived early.
possible_revelations.recontextualizes: The audit exposes an old protection debt.

possible_revelations.statement: One Resonant has already left through an Undrift route.
possible_revelations.emergence_condition: Ash is cornered away from Corvin.
possible_revelations.recontextualizes: The shortfall is active resistance, not only scarcity.

moral_fault_lines.why_it_hurts: Both sides can name people who die if ignored.

moral_fault_lines.side_a: Rule in front of the crowd.
moral_fault_lines.why_it_hurts: Each path makes the other look corrupt.

escalation_options.condition: The Warden misses a filing beat.
The Warden appears to side with the Synod.
escalation_options.consequence: The crowd names the Warden as occupier.

editorialized_lore.item: Synod tithe ledgers are binding public instruments.
editorialized_lore.relevance_now: The ledger makes every delay visible.
editorialized_lore.delivery_method: Corvin taps the seal, not the page.

editorialized_lore.item: Undrift routes survive by never becoming stories.
editorialized_lore.relevance_now: Ash cannot explain the route without endangering it.

arc_link.player_stance_read: The Warden has not yet picked enforcement or mediation.

pacing_contract.chapter_question: Can the Warden enter the dispute without collapsing it into enforcement?

opening_scene_spec.initial_state: The ledger is open before the Warden has sat down.
opening_scene_spec.first_player_facing: Corvin asks whether the Warden recognizes the seal.
opening_scene_spec.immediate_choice: Accept the ledger frame or challenge the premise.
withheld_premise_facts: The Undrift route has already moved one Resonant.

human_stakes.what_is_lost: Their trust stops protecting the PC unless repaired.
The PC becomes known as too costly to help.
